the development and deployment of AI will require additional investment and increase our costs
We are in the early stages of incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) into our business activities and our product and service offerings.

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: no quantified AI spend, headcount, or named programs disclosed; only early-stage acknowledgment and forward-looking cost references.
ai_narrative_concreteness: no named AI initiatives, use cases, or deployment status described; language is entirely aspirational and risk-framing.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: risk section present and contains company-specific AI risk mechanisms (algorithmic bias, product failure, regulatory compliance costs, competitive disadvantage), justifying score 4; no quantification or named governance bodies found to reach score 5.
